name: @codeai/cads-artifact
description: Portable CADS prototyping skill + self-contained HTML runtime (internal / organization-only)

scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @codeai/cads-react run build && pnpm --filter @codeai/cads-variables run build && pnpm run build && node scripts/generate-artifact.mjs --example teacher-onboarding && pnpm run package-skill
